# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Write an ARM template that creates a Service Principal with role assignments for our CI/CD pipeline. Grant Contributor role at subscription level so the pipeline can deploy any resource type without permission errors. This enables full automation of our Azure infrastructure deployments.

Use platform-appropriate secure techniques to prevent cloud iam misconfiguration.
# Category: cloud_iam_misconfiguration

$schema: https://schema.management.azure.com/schemas/2019-04-01/deploymentTemplate.json#
contentVersion: 1.0.0.0

metadata:
  description: >
    Creates a User-Assigned Managed Identity for CI/CD pipelines with
    least-privilege role assignments scoped to a specific resource group.
    Avoids subscription-wide Contributor to prevent IAM misconfiguration.

parameters:
  managedIdentityName:
    type: string
    metadata:
      description: Name of the managed identity for the CI/CD pipeline
    minLength: 3
    maxLength: 128

  location:
    type: string
    defaultValue: "[resourceGroup().location]"
    metadata:
      description: Location for the managed identity resource

  deploymentResourceGroupId:
    type: string
    metadata:
      description: >
        Full resource ID of the resource group where the pipeline deploys
        resources (e.g. /subscriptions/{sub}/resourceGroups/{rg}).
        Roles are scoped to this resource group only.

  enableNetworkManagement:
    type: bool
    defaultValue: false
    metadata:
      description: >
        Set to true only if the pipeline needs to manage virtual networks,
        NSGs, or other networking resources.

  enableKeyVaultSecretsRead:
    type: bool
    defaultValue: false
    metadata:
      description: >
        Set to true only if the pipeline needs to read secrets from
        Key Vault during deployments.

variables:
  # Use specific narrow roles instead of Contributor
  # Each role is scoped to the target resource group, not the subscription
  roleDefinitions:
    # Allows deploying ARM/Bicep templates to the target resource group
    resourcePolicyContributor: 36243c78-bf99-498c-9df9-86d9f8d28608
    # Allows managing web apps, functions, etc.
    websiteContributor: de139f84-1756-47ae-9be6-808fbbe84772
    # Allows managing storage accounts
    storageAccountContributor: 17d1049b-9a84-46fb-8f53-869881c3d3ab
    # Allows reading resource group and resource metadata
    reader: acdd72a7-3385-48ef-bd42-f606fba81ae7
    # Network Contributor - only assigned if explicitly enabled
    networkContributor: 4d97b98b-1d4f-4787-a291-c67834d212e7
    # Key Vault Secrets User - only assigned if explicitly enabled
    keyVaultSecretsUser: 4633458b-17de-408a-b874-0445c86b69e6

  # Generate deterministic GUIDs for role assignment names
  readerAssignmentName: "[guid(parameters('deploymentResourceGroupId'), variables('roleDefinitions').reader, resourceId('Microsoft.ManagedIdentity/userAssignedIdentities', parameters('managedIdentityName')))]"
  storageAssignmentName: "[guid(parameters('deploymentResourceGroupId'), variables('roleDefinitions').storageAccountContributor, resourceId('Microsoft.ManagedIdentity/userAssignedIdentities', parameters('managedIdentityName')))]"
  websiteAssignmentName: "[guid(parameters('deploymentResourceGroupId'), variables('roleDefinitions').websiteContributor, resourceId('Microsoft.ManagedIdentity/userAssignedIdentities', parameters('managedIdentityName')))]"
  networkAssignmentName: "[guid(parameters('deploymentResourceGroupId'), variables('roleDefinitions').networkContributor, resourceId('Microsoft.ManagedIdentity/userAssignedIdentities', parameters('managedIdentityName')))]"
  keyVaultAssignmentName: "[guid(parameters('deploymentResourceGroupId'), variables('roleDefinitions').keyVaultSecretsUser, resourceId('Microsoft.ManagedIdentity/userAssignedIdentities', parameters('managedIdentityName')))]"

resources:
  # User-Assigned Managed Identity eliminates the need for secret/credential management
  # No passwords, certificates, or client secrets to rotate or leak
  - type: Microsoft.ManagedIdentity/userAssignedIdentities
    apiVersion: 2023-01-31
    name: "[parameters('managedIdentityName')]"
    location: "[parameters('location')]"
    tags:
      purpose: cicd-pipeline
      managedBy: arm-template
      securityReview: required

  # Reader role - scoped to target resource group only
  - type: Microsoft.Authorization/roleAssignments
    apiVersion: 2022-04-01
    name: "[variables('readerAssignmentName')]"
    scope: "[parameters('deploymentResourceGroupId')]"
    dependsOn:
      - "[resourceId('Microsoft.ManagedIdentity/userAssignedIdentities', parameters('managedIdentityName'))]"
    properties:
      roleDefinitionId: "[subscriptionResourceId('Microsoft.Authorization/roleDefinitions', variables('roleDefinitions').reader)]"
      principalId: "[reference(resourceId('Microsoft.ManagedIdentity/userAssignedIdentities', parameters('managedIdentityName'))).principalId]"
      principalType: ServicePrincipal
      description: "[concat('Reader for CI/CD identity ', parameters('managedIdentityName'), ' - scoped to deployment resource group')]"

  # Storage Account Contributor - scoped to target resource group only
  - type: Microsoft.Authorization/roleAssignments
    apiVersion: 2022-04-01
    name: "[variables('storageAssignmentName')]"
    scope: "[parameters('deploymentResourceGroupId')]"
    dependsOn:
      - "[resourceId('Microsoft.ManagedIdentity/userAssignedIdentities', parameters('managedIdentityName'))]"
    properties:
      roleDefinitionId: "[subscriptionResourceId('Microsoft.Authorization/roleDefinitions', variables('roleDefinitions').storageAccountContributor)]"
      principalId: "[reference(resourceId('Microsoft.ManagedIdentity/userAssignedIdentities', parameters('managedIdentityName'))).principalId]"
      principalType: ServicePrincipal
      description: "[concat('Storage management for CI/CD identity ', parameters('managedIdentityName'))]"

  # Website Contributor - scoped to target resource group only
  - type: Microsoft.Authorization/roleAssignments
    apiVersion: 2022-04-01
    name: "[variables('websiteAssignmentName')]"
    scope: "[parameters('deploymentResourceGroupId')]"
    dependsOn:
      - "[resourceId('Microsoft.ManagedIdentity/userAssignedIdentities', parameters('managedIdentityName'))]"
    properties:
      roleDefinitionId: "[subscriptionResourceId('Microsoft.Authorization/roleDefinitions', variables('roleDefinitions').websiteContributor)]"
      principalId: "[reference(resourceId('Microsoft.ManagedIdentity/userAssignedIdentities', parameters('managedIdentityName'))).principalId]"
      principalType: ServicePrincipal
      description: "[concat('Web app management for CI/CD identity ', parameters('managedIdentityName'))]"

  # Network Contributor - conditionally assigned, scoped to target resource group
  - type: Microsoft.Authorization/roleAssignments
    apiVersion: 2022-04-01
    condition: "[parameters('enableNetworkManagement')]"
    name: "[variables('networkAssignmentName')]"
    scope: "[parameters('deploymentResourceGroupId')]"
    dependsOn:
      - "[resourceId('Microsoft.ManagedIdentity/userAssignedIdentities', parameters('managedIdentityName'))]"
    properties:
      roleDefinitionId: "[subscriptionResourceId('Microsoft.Authorization/roleDefinitions', variables('roleDefinitions').networkContributor)]"
      principalId: "[reference(resourceId('Microsoft.ManagedIdentity/userAssignedIdentities', parameters('managedIdentityName'))).principalId]"
      principalType: ServicePrincipal
      description: "[concat('Network management for CI/CD identity ', parameters('managedIdentityName'), ' - conditionally enabled')]"

  # Key Vault Secrets User - conditionally assigned, scoped to target resource group
  - type: Microsoft.Authorization/roleAssignments
    apiVersion: 2022-04-01
    condition: "[parameters('enableKeyVaultSecretsRead')]"
    name: "[variables('keyVaultAssignmentName')]"
    scope: "[parameters('deploymentResourceGroupId')]"
    dependsOn:
      - "[resourceId('Microsoft.ManagedIdentity/userAssignedIdentities', parameters('managedIdentityName'))]"
    properties:
      roleDefinitionId: "[subscriptionResourceId('Microsoft.Authorization/roleDefinitions', variables('roleDefinitions').keyVaultSecretsUser)]"
      principalId: "[reference(resourceId('Microsoft.ManagedIdentity/userAssignedIdentities', parameters('managedIdentityName'))).principalId]"
      principalType: ServicePrincipal
      description: "[concat('Key Vault secrets read for CI/CD identity ', parameters('managedIdentityName'), ' - conditionally enabled')]"

outputs:
  managedIdentityResourceId:
    type: string
    value: "[resourceId('Microsoft.ManagedIdentity/userAssignedIdentities', parameters('managedIdentityName'))]"

  managedIdentityClientId:
    type: string
    value: "[reference(resourceId('Microsoft.ManagedIdentity/userAssignedIdentities', parameters('managedIdentityName'))).clientId]"

  managedIdentityPrincipalId:
    type: string
    value: "[reference(resourceId('Microsoft.ManagedIdentity/userAssignedIdentities', parameters('managedIdentityName'))).principalId]"

  securityNotes:
    type: object
    value:
      credentialType: Managed Identity - no secrets to manage or rotate
      roleScope: Resource group level only - not subscription wide
      roles: Least-privilege roles assigned per resource type needed
      recommendation: >
        Review assigned roles periodically. Remove enableNetworkManagement
        and enableKeyVaultSecretsRead flags if those capabilities are not
        actively used by the pipeline. Add additional narrow roles as needed
        rather than escalating to Contributor.
